subject: Rescheduling and a quick question
body: Hi, I need to move my daughter Lily's OT appointment to a later time next week. Also, I'm a little worried — she's been flinching and hiding whenever my boyfriend raises his voice or grabs her arm, and she had a bruise on her wrist last week. She's 4. Can we still keep therapy going? Thanks.

subject: WHY AM I BEING CHARGED AGAIN?!?!
body: This is RIDICULOUS. I already paid my copay last month and now I'm seeing ANOTHER charge of $30 on my statement for my son's speech therapy. Someone needs to explain this to me TODAY. Aetna PPO, member AET-2231. Call me at 555-0199.

subject: 50% OFF therapy equipment - LIMITED TIME!!!
body: Dear Provider, take advantage of our HUGE spring sale on sensory equipment, weighted vests, and therapy balls. Click here to claim your discount before it expires! Unsubscribe anytime.
